---
title: "Dam Building Century"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
  pdf:
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5, dpi = 150)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)
```

```{r load}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
raw <- read_xlsx(here("data/moesm.xlsx"), sheet = 1)

river <- raw %>%
  select(year = Year, n = Cum_reservoir_n, area_km2 = Cumulative_reservoir_area) %>%
  filter(year >= 1900, year <= 2060)

# Milestone dams (largest in GRanD / historical icons)
milestones <- tibble(
  year = c(1936, 1942, 1964, 1970, 1984, 2006, 2016),
  dam = c("Hoover", "Grand Coulee", "Glen Canyon", "Aswan", "Itaipu", "Three Gorges", "Belo Monte"),
  label = c("Hoover\n1936", "Grand Coulee\n1942", "Glen Canyon\n1964", "Aswan\n1970", "Itaipu\n1984", "Three Gorges\n2006", "Belo Monte\n2016")
)
```

```{r plot}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# River of time: cumulative reservoir count as flowing ribbon
ggplot(river, aes(x = year, y = n)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = 0, ymax = n), fill = "#1c5d99", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(color = "#1c5d99", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_vline(data = milestones, aes(xintercept = year), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(data = river %>% filter(year %in% milestones$year),
             aes(x = year, y = n), size = 4, shape = 21, fill = "#ffffff", color = "#1c5d99", stroke = 1.5) +
  geom_text(data = milestones, aes(x = year, y = max(river$n) * 0.92, label = label),
            size = 2, vjust = 1, color = "gray30") +
  annotate("text", x = 1987, y = max(river$n) * 0.1, label = "Peak emissions ~1987", size = 3, color = "gray40", fontface = "italic") +
  annotate("text", x = 2015, y = max(river$n) * 0.15, label = "Paris 2015", size = 3, color = "gray40", fontface = "italic") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1895, 2065), breaks = seq(1900, 2060, 20)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "The dam-building century",
    subtitle = "Cumulative reservoir count (1900–2060). Milestones: Hoover, Aswan, Itaipu, Three Gorges.",
    x = "Year", y = "Cumulative reservoirs",
    caption = "Source: Soued et al. (2022) Nature Geoscience"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, color = "gray50")
  )
```

**Takeaway:** Reservoir construction accelerated from the mid-20th century; cumulative count grows even as emissions peak. Iconic dams mark the timeline.

**Data:** Soued et al. moesm.xlsx — Cum_reservoir_n, Cumulative_reservoir_area by year. Milestone dams from GRanD / historical records.
